name: pi-project-workflows
description: Typed multi-step workflow execution via .workflow.yaml specs. Schema-driven project state in .project/. Behavior monitors that classify agent activity and steer corrections.
core_value: The runtime is generic; the domain lives in specs, schemas, and templates that users create without touching TypeScript. Add a JSON Schema — get a new block type. Write a .workflow.yaml — get a pipeline. Drop a .monitor.json — get a watchdog. Author an .agent.yaml — get a typed agent contract compiled to prompts at dispatch time.

goals.description: Workflow orchestration with DAG-based parallelism forming a typed loop: project state → workflow input → agent output → validated project state → monitor classification → steering
Schema-driven project blocks with cross-block validation
Autonomous behavior monitors with LLM classification

out: No pi-subagents dependency — extensions own their own dispatch
No runtime TypeScript for domain logic — domain lives in YAML specs, JSON schemas, Nunjucks templates, and monitor JSON specs
